headline: Final Boss Sour Announces $4 Million Raise and Expansion Into Seven Major Retail Chains
summary: LOS ANGELES, July 17, 2026--Final Boss Sour, the gaming-themed better-for-you snack alternative brand known for its bold, retro-gaming-inspired sour snacks, and built in studio by Science Inc, announced today that it has raised $4 million in a strategic funding round. The round includes new investors Evolution VC Partners, The Angel Group, Mondelez International SnackFutures Ventures and other strategic investors, with participation from returning investors Melitas Ventures and GFR Fund. Final B

content.title: Final Boss Sour Announces $4 Million Raise and Expansion Into Seven Major Retail Chains
content.summary: LOS ANGELES, July 17, 2026--Final Boss Sour, the gaming-themed better-for-you snack alternative brand known for its bold, retro-gaming-inspired sour snacks, and built in studio by Science Inc, announced today that it has raised $4 million in a strategic funding round. The round includes new investors Evolution VC Partners, The Angel Group, Mondelez International SnackFutures Ventures and other strategic investors, with participation from returning investors Melitas Ventures and GFR Fund.
